channel.title: Technology on Maxwell Jensen's Personal Website
channel.description: Recent content in Technology on Maxwell Jensen's Personal Website

item.title: Claude: A Waste of Money
item.description: DeepSeek V4 has made Claude and other premium AI subscriptions almost impossible to justify on a cost-benefit basis.

item.title: Should Code be Copyrighted?
item.description: An exploration of whether copyright law, designed for creative works, should apply to something as functional and mathematical as source code.

item.title: The New Sparse Frontier: Flattening by AI
item.description: AI is flattening the software landscape. The only escape is to move into the space it cannot occupy.

item.title: Debunking the Anti-AI Cult
item.description: Is AI the first stepping stone to an utopia, or the downfall of civilisation as we know it? There's a lot to be said, but let's address the doom and gloom.
